title: Vault Timing
description: This mod modifies the vault, so players actually end up with the item that was displayed, when they right-clicked.
body:
Have you ever tried timing your clicks perfectly to get the Heavy Core when it appears in a vault, only to end up with completely different items? If so, this mod is the solution you've been looking for!

By installing this mod on your server (or on your client when playing singleplayer), the myth of timing your clicks to obtain the items you want actually becomes a reality!

(Scroll to the end of the image for further information)

Ingame View:
![Ingame View](https://i.imgur.com/rbK8dGh.gif)

This mod adds 2 new gamerules, that modify the vault drop behaviour, those are:

```
/gamerule modifyNonOminousVaults
```
This gamerule determines whether the non-ominous vault variant should be modified so that the mod's logic is applied. By default, it is set to true.

```
/gamerule vaultsShouldAlsoDropDefaultLoot
```
This gamerule determines whether the vaults should also drop the default loot in addition to the modified loot. By default, it is set to true. In mod version 1.0 this gamerule, doesn't work as intended, so please update to/download the latest version of the mod.
